snippet: Samsung, Noise and Amazfit smartwatches offer water resistance, fitness tracking, AMOLED displays and Bluetooth calling, with ongoing sale discounts on select models.

title: Big tech’s fat profits conceal unsettling cashflows
snippet: In short order America’s biggest companies have gone from printing money to burning it. Amazon, Meta and Microsoft are all expected by analysts to announce negative cashflows in at least one quarter this year.

title: Skyroot Aerospace does a SpaceX, offers Elon Musk-style Esops to its founders
snippet: Skyroot Aerospace founders Pawan Chandana and Naga Bharath Daka can get up to 4% equity if the spacetech startup launches a satellite and raises $100 million at a $1 billion valuation by December 2028.

title: Samsung's South Korean union sticks to strike plan after talks offer; shares slide
snippet: Samsung's labor union remains committed to a strike despite the company's offer of unconditional pay talks, leading to a significant drop in shares. title: Cerebras shares skyrocket in debut as AI mania grips markets
snippet: Cerebras Systems, a chip designer, saw its shares surge 89% on its Nasdaq debut, raising $5.55 billion. title: Grok down: Users report app, website and login issues
snippet: Grok, Elon Musk's AI chatbot, faced significant disruptions on Friday. Users reported being unable to access the service, receive replies, or log in. Most issues were reported by mobile app users. This outage adds to recent technical problems faced by Grok.

title: OpenAI brings Codex coding tool to ChatGPT mobile app
snippet: OpenAI is integrating its Codex coding tool into the ChatGPT mobile app, broadening access to AI code-generation capabilities. This move intensifies competition with rivals like Anthropic, as Codex can write features, answer code questions, fix bugs, and propose pull requests.

title: US judge considers Anthropic's $1.5 billion settlement of authors' lawsuit
snippet: A federal judge is seeking more details on Anthropic's $1.5 billion AI settlement with authors, delaying final approval.
